case_title: RENE MANZANARES RESPONDENT VS. DUDLEY PERKINS COMPANY APPELLANT

docket_entries.description: STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM AND ORDER FILED.
RECORD ON APPEAL JUDGEMENT FILED BY APPELLANT DUDLEY PERKINS COMPANY AS TO RESPONDENT MANZANARES, RENE HEARING SET FOR AUG-21-2003 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 525

NOT REPORTED-SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL HEARING HELD IN DEPARTMENT 525. NO APPEARANCE BY APPELLANT DUDLEY PERKINS. RESPONDENT SWORN AND EXAMINED. DOCUMENTARY EVIDENCE ADMITTED. MATTER TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION IN OPEN COURT. WRITTEN JUDGMENT ORDERED IN FAVOR OF RESPONDENT/PLAINTIFF MANZANARES AND AGAINST APPELLANT/DEFENDANT DUDLEY PERKINS COMPANY IN THE AMOUNT OF $3,347.24 INCLUDING ATTORNEY FEES AND $67.00 IN COSTS. JUDGE PRO TEM ALEXANDER ANOLIK; CLERK MARILYN FLORES
NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF HEARING ON APPEAL
MINUTES FOR AUG-21-2003 9:00 AM FOR DEPT 525

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT RESPONDENT MANZANARES, RENE RECOVER FROM APPELLANT DUDLEY PERKINS COMPANY $3,347.24 PRINCIPAL, $67.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,414.24, EXHIBITS ORDERED RETURNED. SEE SCANNED DOC
